description: A dark yard piled high with discarded metal, old boots, and rusted cans. Sparks occasionally fly from exposed wires.

exit_west.description: A heavy metal door leading back to the Noodle Factory.

scrap_wall.description: Unstable mountains of compressed scrap metal that loom overhead.

scrapyard_floor.description: Oil-stained ground littered with sharp metal shavings.

lost_lens.description: A small metallic compartment buried under a heap of broken gears.

item.name: Magnifying Lens
item.description: A highly polished glass lens that focuses ambient light. Perfect for studying tiny details.

onUse.successMessage: You found a Magnifying Lens! Combined with a frame, it might make a useful tool.

metal_heap.description: A pile of discarded brass and iron scraps.

item.name: Sturdy Brass Frame
item.description: A heavy frame crafted from antique brass. It has a circular opening in the center.

onUse.successMessage: You salvaged a Sturdy Brass Frame! It looks like a handle or support of some kind.

compact_crusher.description: A slow-moving piston that periodically crushes heaps of junk.

broken_boiler.description: An old steam boiler that has cold ash spilling out of its furnace.

exit_east.description: A heavy metal security gate that creaks open just enough to pass.
